title: Shunta Osarian Dharrg
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Bureaucrat |image= |name=Shunta Osarian Dharrg |homeworld=[[Osarian]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' |birth= |death= |species= |gender= |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|They shot first.''"
"''And better if they had shot last. And if Shunta Osarian Dharrg demands reparations, we'll agree, with all apologies, and any monies to be paid will come from Wurth Skidder's private funds.|Wurth Skidder and Leia Organa Solo|''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''}} '''Shunta Osarian Dharrg''' was the leader of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Osarian]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] and an opponent of [[Nom Anor]]'s actions on [[Rhommamool/Legends|Rhommamool]] who viewed [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] meeting with Anor as giving him unacceptable legitimacy. To that end, Dharrg assigned [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Grappa (Rodian)|Grappa]] of the [[Osarian First-Force]] to attempt to prevent her from reaching Rhommamool. This prompted an attack on the Osarians by [[Wurth Skidder]]'s [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] force. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Shunta Osarian Dharrg |es=Shunta Osarian Dharrg }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Dharrg, Shunta Osarian}} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Planetary leaders]]
